title: Nextflow pipeline parameters
description: BiodivPortal Enrichment Workflow — enriches herbarium records via BiodivPortal Annotator and Land Taxonomy Classifier.

input_output_options.title: Input / Output
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to the input CSV file.
input.help_text: A comma-separated file with at minimum the columns HerbariumID, Locality, and FullNameCache.

outdir.description: Output directory where enriched_dataset.csv will be written.

max_records.description: Stop after processing N records. Useful for testing. Leave unset to process all rows.

column_options.title: Column names
column_options.description: Names of the key columns in the input CSV.

id_column.description: Name of the unique record identifier column.

land_text_column.description: Column containing habitat/locality text for the Land Taxonomy Classifier.

biodiv_text_column.description: Column containing species name for the BiodivPortal Annotator.

biodivportal_options.title: BiodivPortal Annotator
biodivportal_options.description: Options for the BiodivPortal ontology annotation service.

biodivportal_url.description: Base URL of the BiodivPortal Annotator API.

biodivportal_apikey.description: BiodivPortal API key. Register free at biodivportal.gfbio.org/account.

biodivportal_ontologies.description: Comma-separated ontology IDs to restrict annotation (optional, e.g. 'ENVO,GFBio').

land_classifier_options.title: Land Taxonomy Classifier
land_classifier_options.description: Options for the local Land Taxonomy Classifier FastAPI service.

land_classifier_url.description: Base URL of the Land Taxonomy Classifier service.

land_classifier_top_k.description: Number of top CORINE Land Cover classifications to return.

land_classifier_model.description: OpenAI model used by the Land Taxonomy Classifier.

email.description: Email address to receive a completion summary. Leave empty to disable.
